mapper.sql: SELECT rep.*, d.name AS device_name, d.asset_no AS asset_no, ur.real_name AS reporter_name, uh.real_name AS handler_name, lr.name AS lab_name FROM lab_device_repair rep LEFT JOIN lab_device d ON d.id = rep.device_id LEFT JOIN lab_room lr ON lr.id = d.lab_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ur ON ur.id = rep.reporter_id LEFT JOIN sys_user uh ON uh.id = rep.handler_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lab_device_repair(device_id, reporter_id, fault_desc, status, report_time) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{reporterId}, #{faultDesc}, #{status}, #{reportTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lab_device_repair WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status IN (0, 1)
